PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5431/dashboard -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP:$\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'data-new-project-trigger'\) { "FOUND data-new-project-trigger" } else { "MISSING data-new-project-trigger" }; if \($r.Content -match 'data-new-project-modal'\) { "FOUND data-new-project-modal" } else { "MISSING data-new-project-modal" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5431/p/agent-teams -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content.Length; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern 'dashboard' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern 'agent-teams' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern 'data-board' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5431/dashboard -UseBasicParsing; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern 'data-new-project-trigger' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern '\\+ New project' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count)

PowerShell($d = Get-Content -Raw -Path _scratch\\recent-tasks.json | ConvertFrom-Json; $d | Where-Object { $_.title -match "flake|test_777" } | Select-Object id, title | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('process_status=',d['process_status'],'completed_at=',d['completed_at'],'subagent_models=',len\(d['subagent_models']\),'entries','all_ac=',all\(c['status']=='passed' for c in d['acceptance_criteria']\)\)")
Bash(Select-Object id, title, process_status, priority, severity, parent_task_id)

PowerShell(curl.exe --silent -H "X-Project-Id: 1" "http://localhost:8456/api/tasks?severity=blocker&process_status=1" -o "_scratch/blockers_todo.json"; \(Get-Content "_scratch/blockers_todo.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Select-Object id, title, process_status, priority, severity, parent_task_id | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($tasks = Get-Content "_scratch/blockers_todo.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $tasks | Where-Object { $_.priority -eq 1 } | Select-Object id, title, parent_task_id, blocked_by, started_at, assigned_role | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($t = curl.exe --silent -H "X-Project-Id: 1" http://localhost:8456/api/tasks/892 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "id: $\($t.id\)"; Write-Output "process_status: $\($t.process_status\)"; Write-Output "started_at: $\($t.started_at\)"; Write-Output "completed_at: $\($t.completed_at\)"; Write-Output "halt_reason: $\($t.halt_reason\)"; Write-Output "---status_change_reason---"; Write-Output $t.status_change_reason)

PowerShell($ids = 893, 894; foreach \($id in $ids\) { $t = curl.exe --silent -H "X-Project-Id: 590" "http://localhost:8456/api/tasks/$id" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "===================== Task #$id \($\($t.run_mode\), role=$\($t.assigned_role\)\) ====================="; Write-Output "title: $\($t.title\)"; Write-Output "ps: $\($t.process_status\) | started: $\($t.started_at\) | completed: $\($t.completed_at\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "--- status_change_reason ---"; Write-Output $t.status_change_reason })

PowerShell($ids = @\(895, 896, 897, 898, 899, 900, 901, 902\); foreach \($id in $ids\) { $t = curl.exe --silent -H "X-Project-Id: 590" "http://localhost:8456/api/tasks/$id" | ConvertFrom-Json; $dur = "?"; if \($t.started_at -and $t.completed_at\) { $dur = [Math]::Round\(\([datetime]$t.completed_at - [datetime]$t.started_at\).TotalSeconds, 1\); }; $title30 = if \($t.title.Length -gt 60\) { $t.title.Substring\(0, 60\) + "..." } else { $t.title }; Write-Output \("#{0,3} role={1} {2,5}s | {3}" -f $t.id, $t.assigned_role, $dur, $title30\); Write-Output \("       result: {0}" -f \($\(if \($t.status_change_reason\) { \($t.status_change_reason -replace '\\s+', ' '\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $t.status_change_reason.Length\)\) + "..." } else { "\(none\)" }\)\)\); Write-Output "" })

PowerShell($id = Get-Content "_scratch/smoke_907_id.txt"; $t = curl.exe --silent -H "X-Project-Id: 590" "http://localhost:8456/api/tasks/$id" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Task #$\($t.id\) — ps=$\($t.process_status\) — duration=$\([Math]::Round\(\([datetime]$t.completed_at - [datetime]$t.started_at\).TotalSeconds,1\)\)s"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "--- LLM output ---"; Write-Output $t.status_change_reason)
